name: Running Head

releases.author: Leike-Dev
releases.description:
# # 🚀 Running Head 2.0.1

## Bug fixes

- **Fixed CSS linter warnings**: Renamed internal CSS classes (`has-breadcrumb-sibling` → `with-breadcrumb-sibling`, `has-overflow` → `is-overflowing`) to eliminate false-positive `:has()` pseudo-class warnings from the Obsidian CSS validator.

## Internal

- No user-facing changes — this is a maintenance release.

releases.author: Leike-Dev
releases.description:
# 🚀 Running Head 2.0.0

This major release marks the culmination of a massive evolution. From our initial transition from the "Folio" identity, we have completely modularized the codebase, optimized performance, introduced dynamic themes, and built major features like Scroll Progress Indicators and our brand-new **Tabs Navigation**.

---

### 1. 🏷️ New Identity: Running Head (formerly Folio)
* **Complete Rename**: Rebranded the entire plugin package from **Folio** to **Running Head**, establishing a clear identity focused on elegant, book/blog-like headers.

### 2. 🗂️ Major Feature: Tabs Navigation
Add an elegant horizontal navigation tab bar directly beneath your note headers to build modular, tab-driven databases or wiki structures:
* **Interactive Modals**: Add and manage tab headers seamlessly with settings menus, custom order render tools, and folder target configurations.
* **Lucide Icon Search & Picker**: Integrated a fuzzy search icon modal in settings. Easily select and copy Lucide icon tags (e.g. `[icon, home]`) directly to your clipboard.
* **3 Layout Styles**:
  * **Underline**: Thick, smooth accent-colored line with rounded active indicator corners.
  * **Pill**: Clean rectangular capsules with subtle border-color opacity matching native Obsidian aesthetics.
  * **Minimal**: Flat, borderless links transitioning color on hover/active states.
* **Desktop & Mobile Gestures**: Grab-and-drag horizontal scroll with click safety thresholds, automatic vertical scroll lock-in prevention on touch interfaces, and mouse-wheel direction mapping.

### 3. 📊 Scroll Progress Bar
* **Visual Reading Indicator**: A sleek, customizable progress bar fixed at the top of your active note that dynamically tracks how far you have read in real-time.
* **Responsive Rendering**: Listens and throttles window scrolling, updating smoothly in the background.

### 4. 🧠 CJK-Friendly Reading Time
* **Intelligent Word Counter**: Optimized word calculation to properly process Chinese, Japanese, and Korean characters, ensuring highly accurate reading time estimation for East Asian languages.

### 5. ⚙️ Settings Portability & Reorganization
* **Import & Export**: Easily backup, copy, or paste your entire plugin configuration JSON to sync settings between vaults or devices.
* **Collapsible Sections**: Cleaned up the settings pane, grouping interface toggles, colors, and layout configurations into clean, collapsible lists.

### 6. 🎨 Adaptive Color Engine
* **Theme-Aware Colors**: Define custom colors for your metadata path, update badges, or progress bar. The rendering engine adaptively blends with dark or light Obsidian theme variables.
* **Typify Compatibility**: Headers now respect the custom `--pill-radius` variable configured by the Typify plugin, avoiding layout conflicts.

### 7. 🧱 Multi-Window & Structural Compliance
* **Obsidian Popouts**: Full support for multi-window Obsidian instances. Metadata headers and events load and clean up cleanly across multiple note window documents.
* **Refactored Modular Codebase**: Split massive controller files (`metadata-header.ts` and `settings.ts`) into smaller, modular components under `src/` to prevent memory leaks and improve runtime performance.

### 8. 🌐 Complete Multi-Language Localization
* Comprehensive documentation, badges, frontmatter List examples, and interface strings localized for: **English**, **Português**, **Español**, **Français**, and **简体中文**.

---

### 📝 YAML Frontmatter Example (Tabs Navigation)
Create a navigation menu by setting a List property inside your note:

```yaml
tabs-home:
  - "[[Target Note]]"
  - "[icon, home]"
  - "[name, Dashboard]"
```

---

releases.author: Leike-Dev
releases.description:
# Folio 1.0.0 📝

The first public release of **Folio** — a plugin that transforms your Obsidian notes with elegant, blog-style metadata headers.

## ✨ Features

### 📰 Blog-Style Metadata Header
Automatically injects a beautiful header below your note title displaying:
- **Publication date** — pulled from your frontmatter (e.g., `date: 2024-08-06`)
- **Reading time** — calculated automatically based on word count and your configured WPM
- **Last updated badge** — shows when the note was last modified (e.g., `updated: 2024-09-10`)

### 🎨 Two Layout Modes
- **Blog** — All metadata displayed together below the title, inspired by modern blog platforms
- **Wiki** — Compact badges positioned at the top-right corner, Wikipedia-style

### 🧩 Custom Fields
Display **any YAML frontmatter property** directly in the header:
- Supports text, lists, tags, and links (auto-detected from the value content)
- Optional display labels for each field
- Position fields above or below the title
- **Folder scoping** — hide specific fields when viewing notes inside certain folders

### 🍞 Folder Breadcrumb
A clickable breadcrumb trail showing the full folder path of the current note, with an optional accent-colored highlight on the last segment.

### 🗓️ Advanced Date Formatting
- **18 locales** supported out of the box (EN, PT-BR, ES, FR, DE, IT, JA, ZH-CN, KO, RU, AR, and more)
- Short and long date formats
- Custom date format strings using Moment.js syntax

### 🔗 Bases Plugin Integration
Inject custom **Lucide icons** into the column headers of the Bases plugin's Table view, giving your databases a polished, professional look.

### 🤝 Typify Integration
When the [Typify](https://github.com/Leike-Dev/Obsidian-Typify) plugin is installed, Folio automatically detects and applies your configured pill styles (colors and icons) to matching values in the metadata header — no extra configuration needed.

### 🌍 Internationalization (i18n)
The entire plugin UI is fully translated into:
- 🇺🇸 English
- 🇧🇷 Português (Brasil)
- 🇪🇸 Español
- 🇫🇷 Français
- 🇨🇳 简体中文

## 📱 Compatibility
- **Desktop & Mobile** — Works on all platforms (`isDesktopOnly: false`)
- **Minimum Obsidian version:** 0.15.0

## 🛠️ Technical
- Zero external dependencies — built entirely with the Obsidian API
- Clean unload — all injected DOM elements and observers are properly removed on plugin disable
- Debounced injection prevents excessive DOM manipulation during rapid events
- Full ESLint compliance with zero errors
- CI/CD via GitHub Actions (Node 20.x / 22.x)
